page_content:
Formerly: EDCI730.

TLPL743 Teaching Multilingual Learners: Current and Future Research Directions in Applied Linguistics and Language Education (3 Credits) Examines the research base on teacher education through an equity- oriented lens, asking the larger question: How can we prepare teachers of multilingual learners to engage in humanizing and asset-oriented pedagogies? It also explores opportunities for future research in teacher education.

Credit Only Granted for. EDCI734 or TLPL743.
